name: @openwop/example-mcp-stdio-bridge
description: HTTP shim that lets the openwop MCP conformance probe exercise stdio-transport MCP servers. Spawns the configured stdio command as a child process, forwards JSON-RPC requests over stdin, correlates responses by id, returns them as application/json — the probe's content-negotiated default. Per-session child processes are kept alive across requests so MCP initialize state survives.
